title: Dermatology services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology services in Quito with clear medical decisions, indicated technology, and consistent follow-up.
heading: Dermatology services
introTitle: Choose the route that best describes what concerns you today
introDeck: Each service is organized so you understand goals, process, and follow-up timing before treatment begins.

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
featured.copy: Comprehensive first evaluation to define priorities with clear clinical explanation from day one.

featured.title: Case-indicated dermatology laser
featured.copy: Laser indicated by phototype and objective, with medical parameters reviewed at each control.

featured.title: Telemedicine with responsible escalation
featured.copy: Remote pathway for next-step guidance and in-clinic escalation when direct examination is needed.

sections.title: Clinical foundation
sections.deck: Routes for deep diagnosis and control of common conditions with staged follow-up.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: Initial map of risk, priorities, and treatment direction for a confident start.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flare and sensitivity control through response-based clinical adjustments.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early lesion reading with warning criteria and an active monitoring plan.

sections.title: Medical treatments
sections.deck: Procedures indicated when they add clinical value and can be monitored safely.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Traceable settings for lesions, scars, and texture improvement under medical supervision.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: Skin renewal with formulas selected by phototype, sensitivity, and objective.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Progressive firmness support through responsible indication and zone-based follow-up.

sections.title: Continuity and family
sections.deck: Programs for long-term continuity, mixed cases, and family guidance.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Pediatric care with plain language for caregivers and daily routines.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: Cross-route support for combined skin, hair, and nail symptoms.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Remote guidance to decide whether online continuity or in-clinic review is required.

initiatives.title: Clinical photo registry
initiatives.copy: We compare images under consistent conditions to measure change with better precision.

initiatives.title: Active flare pathway
initiatives.copy: Early adjustment when lesions return or sensitivity rises.

initiatives.title: Guided family decisions
initiatives.copy: Practical home plan with warning signs and concrete next steps.

initiatives.title: Pigmented lesion route
initiatives.copy: Consultation is prioritized when a mole or spot changes recently.

initiatives.title: Phototype calibration
initiatives.copy: Energy and frequency are tuned to your measured skin response in each session.

initiatives.title: Skin support sequence
initiatives.copy: Session combinations improve texture and firmness with realistic expectations.

initiatives.title: Consent in plain language
initiatives.copy: Rules and responsibilities are explained without unnecessary legal complexity.

initiatives.title: Responsible remote escalation
initiatives.copy: Telemedicine stays active with clear criteria for in-clinic transition.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: While web scheduling is updated, you can start through telemedicine or review active service routes.
